entry.title: The Language of Flowers
entry.summary:
Author: arduine

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,162Chapters: 11/15Kudos: 37

Summary: In which: there are flowers, feelings, fantasy, and forgiveness -- although not necessarily in that order.orFor as long as Arthur could remember, the importance of tradition had been impressed upon him. So, it was only natural for the prince to assume using Camelot’s oldest would be the perfect way of expressing his intentions. This is, of course, a terrible decision.

entry.title: The Tiny Glow of Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Itscanonifwewishenough

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,682Chapters: 9/15Kudos: 249

Summary: He shouldn’t have done it.Sleeping with his king — in the state Arthur was in that night.The worst part is, he doesn’t even remember all of it.— Just enough. The kiss. Arthur’s mouth, warm against his own. The breathless moans pulled from his throat. The way it felt like he was drunk — but even without the potion that caused all of this, Merlin knew one touch from Arthur would make him feel like he'd spent two whole weeks drinking in the tavern. And flashes of what came next.Enough to know that this time, he truly fucked up.So when he wakes, naked in his king’s bed, Merlin does the only thing he can — he grabs his clothes and runs.He barely makes it to Gaius’s chambers, disheveled and panicked, only to find the old man already holding the book Merlin now realizes — far too late — he mistranslated.And in that moment, it hits him. There is no undoing this. “Merlin,” Gaius says, voice low “pack your things. Go as far away as you can."“You’re carrying His Majesty’s child.” Or Arthur was being too much, and Merlin—a clumsy fool—mistranslated an ancient text and brewed a potion meant to calm His Majesty, only to end up pregnant with the king’s child instead.

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,576Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 19

Summary: "You bring nothing but chaos," Merlin said, his voice echoing against the stone walls. "You will never reach that lake." Arthur closed the distance between them, a dangerous smirk playing on his lips. "Your kind only knows how to kneel, Merlin. Have you ever knelt for anyone?" Merlin didn't flinch. Instead, a wicked, knowing smile brushed his face. "No," he whispered, his breath teasing Arthur's skin. "But if you want to show me..." Beneath his skin, an ancient magic stirred impatiently. Arthur locked his gaze onto him. "Then by all means, try." In that moment, one thing became certain: Someone was going to kneel. — Long ago, humans and the Ezakis fought a war that nearly destroyed both races. At Lake Avalon, their kings finally swore peace before the sacred sword in stone, beginning the Age of Hazar. Years later, Uther Pendragon rose to power and shattered that peace. Desperate, humanity turned to Lake Avalon once more. The lake revealed Magic, and a colossal wall was raised between humans and the Ezakis. The spell could never break, the gate could never open, and humanity’s secret had to remain hidden. Yet another power was born that day—Merlin.

entry.title: Kill Your Darlings➳Merthur
entry.summary:
Author: asomina

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,088Chapters: 11/12Kudos: 273

Summary: There's something off about the way Merlin is looking at Arthur. He's nervous, awkward and instead of hiding his suspicious behaviour with insults or jokes. He drowns Arthur's concerns with kisses. or.... In which Mordred disguises himself as Merlin to destroy Camelot from the inside. However, he mistakenly believes Merlin and Arthur are in an extremely intense, romantic relationship. Maybe he embodies Merlin a little too well.   Aka the body swap AU no one asked for.Featuring band favourites: Flirty Gwaine, lesbian awaking Morgana, himbo Arthur, Mordred being confused and Merlin finally getting the day off he needed.

entry.title: Firebug
entry.summary:
Author: seraknockiddy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,214Chapters: 6/13Kudos: 6

Summary: A series of mysterious fires has been terrorizing the small town of Colchester for months now. Uther Pendragon, the incumbent mayor, finds this anything but amusing - especially so close to the town's bi-thousandth anniversary celebrations. Consequently, he has no choice but to call in outside help to restore peace to his beautiful town (and ensure his re-election next year). Arthur - his son and the chief of the local fire department - is far from thrilled at the prospect of being scrutinized by a conceited big-city inspector. Not that he has anything to hide, mind you; in fact, he feels he has had the situation quite well under control on his own - until another fire nearly costs one of his crew members their life ...

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,190Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 49

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,558Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 27

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon's protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon's curse begins to stir - and Uther Pendragon's madness stands as a warning - Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

entry.title: Sublysis
entry.summary:
Author: RubiesareforHunting

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 183,464Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 472

Summary: Merlin is a great detective. They call him Magic, for a reason. But when Arthur Pendragon realizes that the famous detective who has been plaguing his criminal organization for five years, is designated Submissive…well. All’s fair in love and war. At an impasse where both of them will do anything it takes to keep the other one from revealing their secrets, the only way to survive might just be a truce that neither of their organizations can know about.Mutually assured destruction never felt so good.

entry.title: Destiny Shivers
entry.summary:
Author: Chaotic_Thirst_Goblin

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 400Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Merlin knows better than anyone that Arthur belongs to Albion, legends, and a future already written prophecy and secrets. But he takes every moment as they come, and he and Arthur form a bond, and find love that might just change their destiny after all. This collection of 100-word drabbles will share tales about about magic, kisses, devotion, destiny, and the precarious experience of loving someone history thinks it's already claimed. For the Come What May challenge on Tumblr.

entry.title: His Majesty My King
entry.summary:
Author: Bollsye

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,605Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 110

Summary: Arthur’s hand clenched into a fist, his entire body coiled like a drawn blade. Water dripped steadily from his armor, pooling at his feet, but he stood tall despite it every inch a king, the people could feel it in his energy.But his eyesHis eyes betrayed him.Confusion. Disbelief. The dawning realization that nothing before him made sense.The lake behind him was calm.Too calm.As if it had never held him at all.Arthur swallowed hard, his voice lower now, edged with something far more uncertain.“…Merlin?”No one answered.And the crowd only grew. ---------------------------* Or Arthur has finally returned and English is hard

entry.title: the power of an iPod nano and shania twain
entry.summary:
Author: bluelion28

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,012Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: “I was just listening to music, and I don’t know, it got me thinking. That I love you. And how I just now realized it, which is dumb, since I’ve probably been in love with you forever. And I’m sure most of Camelot knew that, and maybe thinking does hurt my brain,” Arthur nervously stumbles out.Arthur is revived and brought back into the 21st century. Merlin keeps Arthur entertained by introducing him to different technologies, one by one. Arthur stumbles upon "You're Still The One" by Shania Twain on his newest device, the iPod Nano. Shania helps him realize he is in love with Merlin, and has been all along.

entry.title: Unarmoured
entry.summary:
Author: HowDidIGetHere20

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 527,384Chapters: 98/100Kudos: 687

Summary: Arthur has always taken Merlin on every mission — unarmoured, untrained, endlessly reckless. It never used to matter. But lately, every danger feels sharper. Every close call lasts too long. And Merlin is starting to notice the way Arthur hovers… and how the prince’s worry is beginning to look a lot like something else. A slow-burn story about devotion disguised as duty, love revealed through quiet choices, and the people who become home when the world turns dangerous. Love wins — even when it has to fight for it. Written with a companion playlist (linked in the notes) :)

entry.title: A Delicate Constellation
entry.summary:
Author: theletters

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,490Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 61

Summary: "It seems that no matter what he does, destiny will not allow Arthur to escape wholly unscathed." Merlin discovers an unexpected side effect of using his magic on Arthur.

entry.title: marjorie (Merlin's Version)
entry.summary:
Author: mittwoch

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 871Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: It was a day much like any other that Merlin had experienced in the past thousand years.He woke up, took the same path down to the lake, sat at the same spot under the willow tree, and watched the water lap onto the gravel, simply waiting.For in all his years, Merlin never gave up as Arthur did not truly die. For Arthur was the one and future king. He was destined to return, so Merlin patiently waited for him at the place they last parted. And waited. And waited.---Merlin waits for Arthur's return and reflects on their memories together.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

entry.title: Love and Protect
entry.summary:
Author: Timatimmy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,527Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 58

Summary: Merlin flees Ealdor with nothing but a pack on his back and his mother’s desperate instructions: "go to Camelot, hide with Gaius, and keep your head down." With King Cenred hunting for the powerful young warlock born on his borders, the heart of Uther Pendragon's anti-magic kingdom seems like the last place Merlin should be safe.   ​But when an arrogant crown prince risks his life to fetch a cure for a dying servant—guided through the dark by a mysterious, floating orb of blue light—everything changes. Arthur knows Merlin's secret. And instead of execution, Arthur makes a silent, fierce vow: he will protect his clumsy servant, no matter the cost, until he can reshape Camelot into a kingdom safe enough for the man he is secretly falling for.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Once and Future Mikaelson
entry.summary:
Author: arcaneroa

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,029Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 27

Summary: What if Merlin's loneliness changed everything? One frustrated spell didn't just give him a second chance; it rebirthed him in New Orleans as the only son of Klaus and Hayley Mikaelson. When Arthur returns, the same young king Merlin once knew, finds a world full of magic, monsters, and surprises... and a Merlin who's grown in ways he never imagined.

entry.title: No Questions Asked
entry.summary:
Author: isleofthewesternocean (backintimeforstuff)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,125Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 38

Summary: On the journey back to Camelot from the Labyrinth of Gedref, Merlin and Arthur avoid the subject of selfless sacrifice. That is, until they run out of ways to ignore the elephant in the room.
